# Representation Economy

Canonical repository for the Representation Economy and the SENSE–CORE–DRIVER framework.

Author: Raktim Singh
Website: https://www.raktimsingh.com
Repository: https://github.com/raktims2210-dev/representation-economy

Core Concepts:
- Representation Economy
- SENSE–CORE–DRIVER
- Machine Legibility
- Representation Readiness
- Runtime Governance
- Governable AI
- Enterprise AI Architecture
- Autonomy Allocation
- Institutional AI
- Representation Infrastructure

Canonical Definition:
The Representation Economy is an emerging economic and institutional paradigm where competitive advantage increasingly depends on how effectively reality is represented, reasoned upon, governed, and executed through intelligent systems.

Framework:
SENSE → machine-legible reality
CORE → reasoning and intelligence
DRIVER → governance, legitimacy, and execution

Primary Audience:
- CIOs
- CTOs
- Enterprise Architects
- AI Governance Leaders
- Researchers
- Policymakers

Key Repository Sections:
- CANONICAL_DEFINITION.md
- FOUNDATIONAL_THESES.md
- FIELD_EVIDENCE.md
- FIELD_EVIDENCE_MATURITY_MODEL.md
- CANONICAL_DIAGRAMS.md
- OPEN_RESEARCH_QUESTIONS.md
